title: Lithocarpus litseifolius
taxonomy: Lithocarpus litseifolius is classified as a species of tree within the genus Lithocarpus, which belongs to the family Fagaceae. This family is commonly known as the beech family and includes other species of deciduous and evergreen trees. Lithocarpus litseifolius is further classified as a member of the order Fagales and the class Magnoliopsida. The classification of Lithocarpus litseifolius can be broken down into the kingdom Plantae, indicating its status as a plant. By following this classification, we can understand the relationships between Lithocarpus litseifolius and other species within its family and order.

intro: Lithocarpus litseifolius, also known as the Litseifolia oak, is a species of plant that belongs to the beech family (Fagaceae). This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects that may help to alleviate symptoms of fever, rheumatism, and other health conditions.
